recommendations.description: Fix 2 rule(s) with critical configuration validation issues
recommendations.impact: CRITICAL - Ensures rules correctly validate compliance requirements as specified in rule names

critical_issues.description: Rule checks if ServiceExecutionRole exists instead of validating least privilege IAM policies

current_mapping.expected_value: Should check IAM role policies for least privilege

critical_issues.problem: Rule checks if ServiceExecutionRole exists instead of validating least privilege IAM policies
critical_issues.impact: HIGH - Rule may not validate compliance requirements correctly
critical_issues.recommendation: Add IAM policy validation or clarify rule scope

critical_issues.description: Rule name mentions encryption but doesn't check any encryption configuration fields. Checks checkpoint/output settings but not encryption.

current_mapping.expected_value: Should check encryption configuration for checkpoints and outputs

critical_issues.problem: Rule name mentions encryption but doesn't check any encryption configuration fields. Checks checkpoint/output settings but not encryption.
critical_issues.impact: CRITICAL - Rule doesn't validate what it claims to validate
critical_issues.recommendation: Review and fix field paths/operators to check actual configuration

cross_service_analysis.note: Note: All methods used are kinesisanalytics service methods
cross_service_analysis.explanation: All python_methods (describe_application) belong to kinesisanalytics service. No cross-service issues found.
cross_service_analysis.recommendation: No action needed - rules correctly use kinesisanalytics API methods

yaml_structure.field_paths: All field paths match emit structure

role_least_privilege.issue: Rule checks if ServiceExecutionRole exists instead of validating least privilege IAM policies
role_least_privilege.metadata_intent: Should validate that IAM role has least privilege policies
role_least_privilege.reason: IAM policy validation would require cross-service calls to IAM service, which is beyond the scope of this rule
role_least_privilege.recommendation: This is a limitation - IAM policy validation would require additional API calls to IAM service. Consider this a placeholder check that verifies a role is configured.

encryption_check_missing.issue: Rule name mentions encryption but doesn't check any encryption configuration fields
encryption_check_missing.current_implementation: Checks checkpoint and output configuration (CodeContentType, SnapshotsEnabled, CheckpointingEnabled, etc.) but not encryption
encryption_check_missing.metadata_intent: Should check that checkpoints and outputs are encrypted
encryption_check_missing.reason: Kinesis Analytics v1 API may not expose encryption fields in describe_application response, or encryption is configured at the resource level (Kinesis streams, S3 buckets) rather than at the application level
encryption_check_missing.recommendation: Review AWS Kinesis Analytics v1 API documentation to determine if encryption fields are available. If not, this rule may need to be renamed or the encryption check may need to be performed at the resource level (checking Kinesis streams and S3 buckets for encryption).
